description: Program-memory v3 contradiction log capturing source conflicts before adjudication.

required_fields.name: claim_topic
required_fields.description: Claim topic or field under dispute.

required_fields.name: source_document_id_a
required_fields.description: First source document in the contradiction pair.

required_fields.name: source_document_id_b
required_fields.description: Second source document in the contradiction pair.

optional_fields.name: preferred_source_document_id
optional_fields.description: Preferred source when one already dominates.

optional_fields.name: rationale
optional_fields.description: Optional explanation for the contradiction state.
